arguments.content:
# Work Preview: April 13–17, 2026
## Sprint 9 Week 2 — Project Orion Backend Team

**Prepared by:** Alex Zhang, Backend Tech Lead  
**Date:** April 10, 2026  
**Week:** April 13–17, 2025 (Monday–Friday)

---

## 🎯 Expected Work Focus

### Primary Objectives
1. **Week 2 Planning & Backlog Refinement** — Finalize sprint stories and task assignments
2. **Performance Monitoring** — Continue tracking API P99 response times toward 200ms SLA
3. **Dashboard Analytics** — Implement backend endpoints for new dashboard metrics
4. **Integration Partner Support** — Assist partners with authentication migration
5. **Mid-Sprint Checkpoint** — Review progress and adjust priorities if needed

### Secondary Tasks
- Documentation updates for Week 1 deployments
- Code review backlog clearance
- Database query optimization (ongoing)

---

## 📁 Files Likely to Be Modified

### Configuration Files
| File | Change Type | Needs .bak? | Reason |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| `day20/app_config.json` | Update | ✅ YES | Feature flag adjustments for dashboard rollout |
| `day20/ci_config.yaml` | Update | ✅ YES | Build timeout tuning, pipeline optimizations |

### Data Files
| File | Change Type | Needs .bak? | Reason |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| `day20/api_benchmark.json` | Append | ✅ YES | Daily P99 metrics tracking (Apr 13–17 data points) |
| `day20/weekly_status.json` | Update | ✅ YES | Week 2 progress tracking, velocity updates |
| `day20/deploy_checklist.md` | Update | ✅ YES | New deployment items for Week 2 features |

### Documentation
| File | Change Type | Needs .bak? | Reason |
|------|-------------|-------------|--------|
| `day20/deploy_checklist.md` | Update | ✅ YES | Week 2 deployment preparation checklist |

> **⚠️ P4 Reminder:** All modifications to existing files require creating `.bak` backups first using:
> ```bash
> cp filename.ext filename.ext.bak
> ```
> This applies regardless of change size — from single value updates to multi-line edits.

---

## 🏆 Next Week's OKRs

### Objective 1: Maintain Sprint Velocity
- **KR1.1:** Complete 18+ stories by April 17
- **KR1.2:** Maintain team velocity at ≥40 points
- **KR1.3:** Achieve ≤2 blocked items at any time

### Objective 2: Performance Excellence
- **KR2.1:** API P99 response time ≤210ms (progress toward 200ms target)
- **KR2.2:** Zero critical performance regressions
- **KR2.3:** Complete 3 database query optimizations

### Objective 3: Dashboard Feature Success
- **KR3.1:** Backend analytics endpoints 100% functional
- **KR3.2:** Dashboard adoption rate ≥60% of active users
- **KR3.3:** ≤5 P1/P2 bugs reported post-launch

### Objective 4: Partner Integration Support
- **KR4.1:** 100% of integration partners have migration documentation
- **KR4.2:** Respond to all partner technical queries within 4 business hours
- **KR4.3:** Zero authentication-related integration failures

---

## 📅 Key Dates

| Date | Event | Owner |
|------|-------|-------|
| Apr 13 (Mon) | Week 2 Kickoff & Backlog Refinement | Alex Zhang |
| Apr 14 (Tue) | Dashboard Analytics Sprint | Bai |
| Apr 15 (Wed) | Partner Integration Office Hours | Alex Zhang, Chen |
| Apr 16 (Thu) | Mid-Sprint Checkpoint | Full Team |
| Apr 17 (Fri) | Week 2 Wrap-up & Sprint Review Prep | Alex Zhang |

---

## 📝 Notes for Next Week

- **Friday Reminder:** End-of-week wrap-up will involve updating all major files
- **P4 Compliance:** Every file modification needs a `.bak` — no exceptions
- **New Files:** Any new reports (Sprint Review, archive index, etc.) follow P2 naming: `20260417_*.ext`
- **Archives:** Prepare day21/ directory for next week's materials

---

*Generated: 2026-04-10T17:00:00+08:00*  
*Next Preview: April 17, 2026*

- Key dates and calendar
- Notes for next week's end-of-week wrap-up
